use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in SaaS dashboards and web applications
Form submission and action triggers in fintech and e-commerce platforms
Navigation and interaction controls in developer tooling interfaces
Accessible button components supporting keyboard navigation and screen readers
Composable button primitives for building complex UI components like tour popovers
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling, Radix UI Slot for composition, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Features disabled states, focus-visible outlines, and subtle shadow effects. Part of the Ruixen.Ui design system, commonly used as the interactive element within tour popover overlays to guide users through product onboarding flows.
